name: Zippy Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a small saucepan.
2. Add green bell pepper and onion to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is tender.
3. If using canned peppers, cook the onion alone first.
4. Stir in all the remaining ingredients.
5. Heat mixture to boiling, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve hot over patties.
